title: The Ball Trial Overwhelms the Crew
description: The Straw Hats fight back against Satori’s tricks, turning confusion and panic into a direct counterattack.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Wyper, Satori, Luffy, Narrator, Sanji. The Straw Hats fight back against Satori’s tricks, turning confusion and panic into a direct counterattack.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: I'll just stretch my arms... myself...

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Just tell me, what did you see?

dialogue.speaker: Satori
dialogue.text: Because I can't believe what I saw!!!

dialogue.speaker: Satori
dialogue.text: Satori lost... His mantra was disrupted in

dialogue.speaker: Satori
dialogue.text: They are not like the others.

dialogue.speaker: Satori
dialogue.text: They were unrestrained at the altar, too...

dialogue.speaker: Satori
dialogue.text: But they have no means of escaping

dialogue.speaker: Satori
dialogue.text: Even if they are left alone...

summary: The Straw Hats fight back against Satori’s tricks, turning confusion and panic into a direct counterattack.
